rationale: Acting on Review 2 would replace the intentionally fiber-specific lemmas (mapsTo_fiber, mapsTo_fiber_symm, fiberHomeomorph) and their docs with more general preimage versions; while the generalization is valid and the proofs adapt, this is a design preference rather than a required fix for the Deck API or the universal-covers roadmap, so no maintainer would insist. Review 1's approval is sound, leaving an equally good merged PR.
